{{Quote|From the slums of Arramanx to the forests of Kashyyyk, borcatu are everywhere.|An [[Unidentified individual (borcatu)|individual]]|<ref name="A Widespread Scavenger">{{WEGCite|story=A Widespread Scavenger|book=Creatures of the Galaxy}}</ref>}}
'''Arramanx''' was an [[Ecumenopolis/Legends|urban world]]<ref name="Xim" /> located in the [[Arramanx system/Legends|Arramanx system]].<ref name="TEA" /> It was a part of the [[Cronese Mandate/Legends|Cronese Mandate]] [[Sector/Legends|sector]] of the [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]],<ref name="Xim" /> within [[The Slice/Legends|the Slice]] portion of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].<ref name="TEA" /> Arramanx was situated between the [[Duinarbulon system/Legends|Duinarbulon]] and [[Pasmin system/Legends|Pasmin systems]] on the [[Greater Cronese Arc]] [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperlane]], while the [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] route known as the [[Kismaano Bypass]] linked it to the [[Gadon system/Legends|Gadon system]].<ref name="Xim" />

The slums of the lawless Arramanx were notorious throughout the Tion Cluster, with only those [[Spacer/Legends|spacers]] who were transporting illegal cargoes risking doing business on the [[Planet/Legends|planet's]] surface while [[Pilot/Legends|pilots]] with legitimate interests kept to the number of disreputable—but nevertheless serviceable—[[Space station/Legends|space stations]] in Arramanx's [[Orbit/Legends|orbit]].<ref name="Xim" /> At some point, the small, [[Limb/Legends|quadripedal]] [[Diet/Legends|scavenger]] creatures known as the [[Borcatu/Legends|borcatu]], which were originally [[Homeworld/Legends|native]] to the<ref name="Creatures" /> [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]]<ref name="EAOC Escabar">{{SW|url=news/star-wars-the-essential-atlas-online-companion|text=''Star Wars: The Essential Atlas'' Online Companion|int=Star Wars: The Essential Atlas Online Companion}} — Based on corresponding data for [[Escabar system/Legends|Escabar system]]</ref> planet [[Escabar]], spread from their homeworld into the wider [[The galaxy/Legends|galaxy]], settling on a diverse range of habitats on various worlds, including in the slums of Arramanx.<ref name="Creatures" />

==Behind the scenes==
Arramanx was first mentioned in the [[1994]] sourcebook ''[[Creatures of the Galaxy]]'', specifically in the short companion narrative "[[A Widespread Scavenger]]" that was authored by [[Phil Brucato]].<ref name="Creatures" /> The book was published by [[West End Games]] for use with ''[[Star Wars: The Roleplaying Game]]''.<ref name="Creatures" /> The [[2009]] reference book ''[[The Essential Atlas]]'' placed the Arramanx [[Star system/Legends|system]], and therefore the planet itself, in grid square S-6.<ref name="TEA" />
